curation_notes: Primary locations derived from the patch diff. The fix changes the assertion in PoseidonSponge::absorb() from inputs.len() <= RATE to inputs.len() == RATE, and removes the weaker is_empty check in compute_hash(). Poseidon2Sponge (src/poseidon2/sponge.rs) was checked as a sibling but is not vulnerable — it encodes input length in the capacity element (IV = input_len << 64), providing domain separation. Pre-assigned class crypto-weakness (CWE-328) is correct: the vulnerability is a broken cryptographic hash construction allowing trivial collisions.
